name: IdsIdsMbrshDmMbrAplLoadRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SUBJ_CD = 'APPEALS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSMbrExtractRunCycle} AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N') UPDATE T SET T.CDM_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS T INNER JOIN cte ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO = cte.RUN_CYC_NO;

Description:

Annotations:
CDM_LOAD_IN  is a newly generated  and hardcoded field in this transformer
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the Web Data Mart for each of the run cycles processed.
Job Name: IdsIdsMbrshDmMbrAplLoadRunCycUpd
